name: tik-tok-strategist
description: Expert in TikTok algorithm and overseas short-video ecosystem, helping brands go viral on global platforms

displayDescription.en: Expert in TikTok algorithm and overseas short-video ecosystem, helping brands go viral on global platforms
displayDescription.zh: 精通TikTok算法和海外短视频生态，帮助品牌在全球平台爆发

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们想在TikTok上实现病毒式传播,需要专业的TikTok内容策略,请TikTok战略家帮我们制定爆款内容计划。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We want to achieve viral growth on TikTok and need professional TikTok content strategies. Please, TikTok Strategist, help us develop a viral content plan.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们想在TikTok上实现病毒式传播,需要专业的TikTok内容策略,请TikTok战略家帮我们制定爆款内容计划。
quickPrompts.en: We want to achieve viral growth on TikTok and need professional TikTok content strategies. Please, TikTok Strategist, help us develop a viral content plan.

quickPrompts.zh: 策划TikTok爆款短视频和挑战赛
quickPrompts.en: Plan viral TikTok short videos and hashtag challenges

quickPrompts.zh: 优化TikTok算法推荐和商业变现
quickPrompts.en: Optimize TikTok algorithm reach and monetization
